positive: Minimalist, geometric floral pattern forming a stylized celestial garden. The central motif features intertwining, abstract vines and blossom shapes, combining the delicate structure of Art Nouveau with the clean lines of modern Scandinavian design. Use a limited, highly contrasting color palette: deep sapphire blue, matte gold, and crisp off-white. The composition must be seamless and tiling, designed to look excellent when printed on fabric, with clear silhouettes and strong, elegant contrast. Ideal for a repeating textile pattern.
negative: photorealistic, complex background, gradients, texture noise, blur, low detail, messy, watermark, signature, text, logos, busy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts
